summary: Iteration 32 - Tested NEW Artist Public Profile feature. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Public profile page at /artist/:slug shows artist name, avatar, stats (3.1K streams), pre-save campaigns with 'Pre-Save Now' button, KALMORI badge linking to home, and Share Profile button with copy-to-clipboard feedback. Settings page has 'Public Profile' tab with slug input, Copy Link, View Profile buttons, and 'What fans will see' checklist (6 items). 404 page renders correctly for non-existent slugs.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/artist/profile/slug requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: GET /api/artist/profile/slug returns user's slug
Backend: GET /api/artist/profile/slug auto-generates slug if none exists
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/slug requires authentication
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/slug updates user's slug successfully
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/slug rejects slugs < 2 characters (400 Bad Request)
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/slug with empty string auto-generates random slug (starts with 'artist-')
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/slug normalizes input (lowercase, removes special chars)
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/slug allows same user to update to same slug
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} does not require authentication (public endpoint)
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} returns artist profile data (artist_name, slug, releases, presave_campaigns, stats)
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} returns optional fields (bio, genre, country, avatar_url, social links)
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} releases have correct structure (id, title, release_type, status)
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} presave campaigns have correct structure (id, release_date)
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} returns 404 for non-existent slug
Backend: GET /api/artist/{slug} excludes sensitive data (password, email, _id)
Backend: Slug with spaces converted to dashes
Backend: Slug with uppercase converted to lowercase
Frontend: Public profile page at /artist/:slug loads successfully (data-testid='artist-profile-page')
Frontend: Artist name displayed (data-testid='artist-name')
Frontend: Artist avatar displayed (data-testid='artist-avatar')
Frontend: KALMORI badge present and links to home (data-testid='kalmori-badge')
Frontend: Share Profile button present (data-testid='share-profile-btn')
Frontend: Share bar at bottom present (data-testid='share-bar')
Frontend: Streams stat displayed (data-testid='stat-streams')
Frontend: Pre-save campaigns section present with cards (data-testid='presave-section')
Frontend: Share Profile button shows 'Copied!' feedback after click
Frontend: 404 page displayed for non-existent artist (data-testid='artist-not-found')
Frontend: 404 page has 'Artist Not Found' heading
Frontend: 404 page has 'Back to Home' button linking to /
Frontend: Settings page loads (data-testid='settings-page')
Frontend: Public Profile tab present (data-testid='public-profile-tab')
Frontend: Slug input present with current value (data-testid='slug-input')
Frontend: Save slug button present (data-testid='save-slug-btn')
Frontend: Copy Link button present (data-testid='copy-profile-url-btn')
Frontend: View Profile button present and links to /artist/{slug} (data-testid='view-profile-btn')
Frontend: Public Profile URL section present (data-testid='public-profile-url-section')
Frontend: 'What fans will see' checklist shows 6 items with completion status
Frontend: Slug update shows success toast 'Profile URL updated!'
critical_code_review_comments: Public profile endpoint correctly excludes sensitive user data (password_hash, email)
Slug generation properly sanitizes input (lowercase, removes special chars, converts spaces to dashes)
Empty slug input auto-generates random slug with 'artist-' prefix
Duplicate slug check correctly excludes current user's own slug
Frontend properly handles 404 state with user-friendly error page
Share button uses clipboard API with fallback for older browsers
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin user data. Admin has: 3.1K streams, 1 active pre-save campaign (dropping May 1, 2026 with 3 pre-saves)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested the NEW Artist Public Profile feature. Backend endpoints: GET /api/artist/profile/slug (get user's slug, auto-generates if none), PUT /api/artist/profile/slug (set custom slug), GET /api/artist/{slug} (public profile, no auth). Frontend: ArtistProfilePage at /artist/:slug with data-testids: artist-profile-page, artist-name, artist-avatar, kalmori-badge, share-profile-btn, share-bar, stat-streams, stat-releases, releases-section, presave-section, release-card-{id}, presave-card-{id}. 404 page: artist-not-found, back-home-btn. Settings Public Profile tab: public-profile-tab, slug-input, save-slug-btn, copy-profile-url-btn, view-profile-btn, public-profile-url-section. Slug validation: min 2 chars, max 50 chars, lowercase, no special chars, spaces become dashes.

get_slug_endpoint.behavior: Returns user's slug, auto-generates if none exists

set_slug_endpoint.validation: Min 2 chars, max 50 chars, rejects duplicates (409), normalizes input

public_profile_page.404_handling: Shows 'Artist Not Found' page with Back to Home button

components: Profile URL section with slug input
